_doc: Native R2 lifecycle rules applied via scripts/apply-r2-lifecycle.mjs.
This file is JSONC-ish: fields whose name starts with '_' and any '// ...'
line comments are stripped by the apply script before the request body is
posted to the Cloudflare API. Keep schema in sync with:

_comment: Aborts multipart uploads that have not been completed within 24h.
The direct-upload flow uses presigned POSTs capped at 2 MB so it does
NOT start multipart uploads, but any ad-hoc client (the AWS SDK in
scripts/, SOP tooling, a future large-file feature) can leave part
data behind on network/process failure. The part data is billed and
not visible to the confirm-upload route's cleanup, so we rely on R2's
own engine as the backstop.
Expires backup objects after 90 days (7776000 seconds).
Backups older than 90 days are no longer needed for operational
recovery and are purged to reduce storage costs. Audit logs are
retained separately for 7 years per compliance requirements.
Expires non-current object versions after 30 days.
When versioning is enabled, overwriting or deleting an object
creates a non-current version. This rule prevents unbounded
storage growth from version accumulation while preserving recent
versions for accidental deletion recovery.
Deletes non-current version (NCV) delete markers after 7 days.
Delete markers are created when an object is deleted in a versioned
bucket. This rule cleans up old markers to prevent metadata bloat.
7 days provides a window for undelete operations while keeping the
bucket metadata lean.
